content:
🔥 tuitter | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Interacting with X (Twitter) content and features directly from the terminal.
✨ Key Features: • Terminal UI client for X (Twitter) • Authentication with X account • Browse and interact with content • Built with TypeScript and OpenTUI • Local token storage
📖 Summary: tuitter is a terminal UI client for X (formerly Twitter) built with TypeScript. It allows users to authenticate with their X account and interact with content directly from their command-line interface.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
